creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 181250
svn diff for sysutils/ffs2recov

I see the source for sysutils/ffs2recov has gone
missing, and it's otherwise unmaintained.
This is an attempt to fix that.

Changes
provide reliable MASTERSITES
add WWW, MAINTAINER

That's it!

Please find the svn diff sysutils_ffs2recov.diff attached.
For bonus points, I'm also adding a QA LOG to prove it works! :)

Thanks!

--Chris
